description_long: This is a two-seater sofa upholstered in a light beige fabric, featuring a plush and inviting appearance. The sofa has broad, rounded armrests that are generously padded and extend slightly outward, providing a sense of comfort and support. The seat consists of a single, wide cushion, while the backrest is divided into two large, attached cushions that mirror the seat's width. The base of the sofa is fully upholstered, with no visible legs, giving it a grounded and monolithic look. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, with smooth, unadorned surfaces and subtle stitching details. This sofa would be suitable for placement in urban public spaces such as lobbies, waiting areas, or residential living rooms.
description: A modern, light beige two-seater sofa with broad, padded armrests and a fully upholstered base. It features smooth surfaces, a single seat cushion, and two attached back cushions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, two attached back cushions, single seat cushion, and broad, rounded armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thick, padded armrest and the sofa's depth, with the backrest and seat cushion profile visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, fully upholstered back with no visible seams or legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the armrest and the sofa's overall depth and padding.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, attached back cushions and a single wide seat cushion, all uniform in size and seamlessly integrated into the sofa's structure.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, rounded, and heavily padded armrests that are slightly flared outward, positioned at seat height and fully upholstered in the same fabric as the rest of the sofa.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base is fully upholstered and extends to the floor, giving the appearance of a solid, continuous block.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, continuous backrest with two attached, plush cushions; the top edge is gently curved and the backrest is thick and supportive.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color with a smooth, matte fabric finish and subtle horizontal stitching; no visible decorative patterns or tufting.
